data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md`. Documents the structured verdict interface emitted by dso:red-test-evaluator (opus) and consumed by sprint/fix-bug orchestrators.

Three verdict formats:
- VERDICT:REVISE — with impact_assessment (must mention both in-progress and closed tasks), affected_tasks array, revision_guidance
- VERDICT:REJECT — with rejection_reason, recommended_model (opus)
- VERDICT:CONFIRM — with infeasibility_category enum (infrastructure | injection | documentation | reference_removal), justification

Input: parses TEST_RESULT:rejected from red-test-writer-output.md contract.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md

## TDD Requirement
test-exempt: no conditional logic, purely structural documentation. Exemption criterion 3.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Contract doc exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md
- [ ] Contains all 3 verdict types
  Verify: grep -q 'VERDICT:REVISE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md && grep -q 'VERDICT:REJECT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md && grep -q 'VERDICT:CONFIRM' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md
- [ ] Contains all 4 infeasibility categories
  Verify: grep -q 'infrastructure' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md && grep -q 'reference_removal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md
